modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Audio/Video equipment not functioning over fiber connection

full_description_text:  
Hey, so I'm having a problem with the audio and video gear. It's not working at all over the fiber connection from the remote spot to the main production room. I tried to get everything set up, but nothing seems to be coming through. It's really frustrating because we need it for the athletics events!
short_description: Audio/Video equipment not functioning over fiber connection
